examples: OBJECTIVE To introduce the pharmacokinetics and pharmacodynamics of gerontic and rational administration of drug.
Objective to investigate the relationship between gerontic cognition declination and hearing function, and to seek an objective method for the related evaluation.
Methods 100 cases of patients with gerontic melancholia were divided into two groups so as to observe the effects and the side-effects of Prozac and amitriptyline working on those patients.
